title: Cobblemon EMI Backported
description: Backport of Cobblemon EMI for Forge 1.20.1!
body:
## Overview

This is a backport of [Cobblemon Emi](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-emi) for the not so modern modern version 1.20.1! It has all the features of the original with minor tweaks for compatibility with Cobblemon 1.5.2.

### Features
- Lists all availible Pokemon in the EMI sidebar
- Recipe tabs for spawns, drops, and evolutions
- [Backport addition] Only Pokemon marked implemented will be listed in EMI (usually this means modeled)
- [Backport addition] Mega and D/Gmax forms are excluded from EMI until those gimmicks are fully backported 
- [Backport addition] Cobblemon Farmers optional compatibility
